wound_compress.description: Compress active bounded/compiler/git wounds into one read-only repair packet.

claim_boundary: Nexus loops are local read-only operator evidence surfaces. They grant no autonomous authority, shell authority, network access, secret access, git write authority, safety proof, security proof, or correctness proof.

ai-orchestrator-preflight.description: Prepare AI meta-orchestration context before choosing the next local loop.
ai-orchestrator-preflight.function: Prepare AI meta-orchestration context before choosing the next local loop.
ai-orchestrator-preflight.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
ai-orchestrator-preflight.title: Ai Orchestrator Preflight

alignment-score.description: Compute a transparent local alignment score from README, doctrine, loop cards, compiler, and boundary signals.
alignment-score.function: Produces a lightweight score explaining what is aligned, weak, missing, or dirty.
alignment-score.operator_use: Use after major changes to decide whether the system is ready for release-seal.
alignment-score.title: Alignment Score

architecture-sketch.description: Sketch the local architecture surfaces touched by a proposed feature.
architecture-sketch.function: Sketch the local architecture surfaces touched by a proposed feature.
architecture-sketch.operator_use: Use before patching a new organ or loop family.
architecture-sketch.title: Architecture Sketch

boundary-scan.description: Verify loop registry, cards, docs, and compiler language preserve non-authority boundaries.
boundary-scan.function: Checks that new tools remain local, non-autonomous, non-network, non-secret, and non-git-write by default.
boundary-scan.operator_use: Use before adding any new command or loop.
boundary-scan.title: Boundary Scan

bounded-validation.description: Run compileall, bounded tests, and compiler.
bounded-validation.function: Run compileall, bounded tests, and compiler.
bounded-validation.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
bounded-validation.title: Bounded Validation

claim-boundary-audit.description: Scan docs for overclaim, authority, proof, safety, and autonomy language.
claim-boundary-audit.function: Keeps public claims aligned with NexusGate's non-authority and non-proof boundary.
claim-boundary-audit.operator_use: Use before publishing README/docs or after large conceptual changes.
claim-boundary-audit.title: Claim Boundary Audit

code-garden-map.description: Map code/docs/tests/electron surfaces as a garden of organs.
code-garden-map.function: Map code/docs/tests/electron surfaces as a garden of organs.
code-garden-map.operator_use: Use for orientation before large changes.
code-garden-map.title: Code Garden Map

command-palette.description: Emit all local loop command surfaces as a command palette.
command-palette.function: Emit all local loop command surfaces as a command palette.
command-palette.operator_use: Use when choosing what the AI should call next.
command-palette.title: Command Palette

commit-story.description: Draft the human release story from intended changes and loop evidence.
commit-story.function: Draft the human release story from intended changes and loop evidence.
commit-story.operator_use: Use before commit messages or release summaries.
commit-story.title: Commit Story

compiler-wound-focus.description: Run compiler and focus exact failed gates.
compiler-wound-focus.function: Run compiler and focus exact failed gates.
compiler-wound-focus.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
compiler-wound-focus.title: Compiler Wound Focus

continuity-seal.description: Verify that docs, loop cards, registry, resume packet, and compiler evidence are visible.
continuity-seal.function: Verify that docs, loop cards, registry, resume packet, and compiler evidence are visible.
continuity-seal.title: Continuity Seal

creative-build-chain.description: Generate an idea, sketch architecture, plan a patch, and choose tests before code changes.
creative-build-chain.function: Turns creative intent into a bounded, testable build plan.
creative-build-chain.operator_use: Use when designing a new feature or tool loop.
creative-build-chain.title: Creative Build Chain

debug-lens.description: Summarize latest failure evidence into a single active wound lens.
debug-lens.function: Summarize latest failure evidence into a single active wound lens.
debug-lens.title: Debug Lens

debug-recovery-chain.description: Convert a failed gate into a focused debug lens, test strategy, and compiler wound focus.
debug-recovery-chain.function: Resumes from wounds without rerunning green gates.
debug-recovery-chain.operator_use: Use immediately after a failed gate or compiler failure.
debug-recovery-chain.title: Debug Recovery Chain

dependency-preflight.description: Check local tool availability for Python, git, Node, npm, PowerShell, and optional runtime surfaces.
dependency-preflight.function: Separates code wounds from environment wounds before patching.
dependency-preflight.operator_use: Use when a command fails unexpectedly or before UI/Electron work.
dependency-preflight.title: Dependency Preflight

docs-doctrine-preflight.description: Read README, doctrine, loop fabric, and cards docs before coding.
docs-doctrine-preflight.function: Read README, doctrine, loop fabric, and cards docs before coding.
docs-doctrine-preflight.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
docs-doctrine-preflight.title: Docs Doctrine Preflight

docs-weaver.description: Find docs that should be updated together to preserve orientation.
docs-weaver.function: Find docs that should be updated together to preserve orientation.
docs-weaver.operator_use: Use when changing any public-facing surface.
docs-weaver.title: Docs Weaver

evolution-radar.description: Generate creative but bounded next-evolution candidates for NexusGate.
evolution-radar.function: Keeps the system evolving by ranking next useful loops, HUD surfaces, tests, and compiler gates.
evolution-radar.operator_use: Use when asking what to build next without drifting away from alignment.
evolution-radar.title: Evolution Radar

failure-intelligence.description: Read latest wound and failure surfaces so the next patch closes the exact wound instead of drifting.
failure-intelligence.function: Read latest wound and failure surfaces so the next patch closes the exact wound instead of drifting.
failure-intelligence.operator_use: Use when this named loop matches the active gate or wound.
failure-intelligence.title: Failure Intelligence

friction-detector.description: Detect workflow friction such as dirty tree, stale versions, backups, and failed compiler gates.
friction-detector.function: Detect workflow friction such as dirty tree, stale versions, backups, and failed compiler gates.
friction-detector.title: Friction Detector

handoff-pack.description: Build a compact ChatGPT/Codex handoff packet from local evidence.
handoff-pack.function: Creates a portable context packet with HEAD, changed surfaces, loops, cards, wounds, and recommended next action.
handoff-pack.operator_use: Use before switching sessions, models, or tools.
handoff-pack.title: Handoff Pack

hud-loop-sync.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
hud-loop-sync.title: Hud Loop Sync

idea-forge.description: Generate bounded next-build ideas from repo state, loop cards, and current intent.
idea-forge.function: Generate bounded next-build ideas from repo state, loop cards, and current intent.
idea-forge.operator_use: Use when the system is clean enough to evolve.
idea-forge.title: Idea Forge

impact-map.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
impact-map.title: Impact Map

local-oracle.description: Recommend the next three loops from current local evidence.
local-oracle.function: Recommend the next three loops from current local evidence.
local-oracle.operator_use: Use when asking what should happen next.
local-oracle.title: Local Oracle

memory-anchor.description: Build a compact continuity anchor with HEAD, latest commits, current loops, and doctrine.
memory-anchor.function: Build a compact continuity anchor with HEAD, latest commits, current loops, and doctrine.
memory-anchor.operator_use: Use before handoff or session restart.
memory-anchor.title: Memory Anchor

next-action-router.description: Recommend the next local loop from current git, compiler, cards, and wound state.
next-action-router.function: Turns local evidence into an AI-orchestratable next-loop recommendation.
next-action-router.operator_use: Use when the AI is unsure whether to rehydrate, clean scope, focus compiler, validate, or seal.
next-action-router.title: Next Action Router

pair-programming-brief.description: Emit a brief that tells ChatGPT exactly how to help next.
pair-programming-brief.function: Emit a brief that tells ChatGPT exactly how to help next.
pair-programming-brief.operator_use: Use before asking the AI for a closer or analysis.
pair-programming-brief.title: Pair Programming Brief

paradise-index.description: Index all paradise loops as a personal coding cockpit.
paradise-index.function: Index all paradise loops as a personal coding cockpit.
paradise-index.title: Paradise Index

paradise-preflight.description: Prime the local coding paradise with repo radar, dependency preflight, boundary scan, and command palette evidence.
paradise-preflight.function: Combines awareness, environment, authority boundary, and available loop commands before a build session.
paradise-preflight.operator_use: Use at the beginning of a serious coding session.
paradise-preflight.title: Paradise Preflight

patch-plan.description: Convert intent into a minimal intended-file patch plan with gates.
patch-plan.function: Convert intent into a minimal intended-file patch plan with gates.
patch-plan.operator_use: Use before generating a closer script.
patch-plan.title: Patch Plan

performance-scout.description: Find lightweight performance and size signals without profiling side effects.
performance-scout.function: Find lightweight performance and size signals without profiling side effects.
performance-scout.operator_use: Use before optimizing or when tests feel slow.
performance-scout.title: Performance Scout

system-monitor-scout.description: Inspect the Electron System Monitor HUD, telemetry contract, and read-only recommendation surfaces.
system-monitor-scout.function: Route system monitor evolution through a named read-only loop before UI or telemetry patches.
system-monitor-scout.operator_use: Use before expanding local telemetry, dashboard monitor panels, or cybersecurity placeholder tabs.
system-monitor-scout.title: System Monitor Scout

phi-gate-auto.description: Run Phi Gate Supervisor with human-authorized allowlisted deterministic repair lanes.
phi-gate-auto.function: Bounded recovery autonomy for known deterministic wounds only; no arbitrary patching or git authority.
phi-gate-auto.operator_use: Use after confirming human authorization for allowlisted repair and rerun behavior.
phi-gate-auto.title: Phi Gate Auto Repair

phi-gate-supervisor.description: Supervise a deterministic gate and call local Phi only when the gate fails.
phi-gate-supervisor.function: Failure-boundary microdose: pass continues; fail compresses, calls Phi, selects allowlisted repair, and reruns only when authorized.
phi-gate-supervisor.operator_use: Use when a Nexus gate should be supervised by local Phi without granting broad autonomy.
phi-gate-supervisor.title: Phi Gate Supervisor

phi-loop-auto.description: Autonomous read-only compress/compile/local-Phi gate selection lane.
phi-loop-auto.function: Bounded loop steering with local Phi; no mutation authority.
phi-loop-auto.operator_use: Use after compile/wound evidence exists and you want a local model to choose the next read-only lane.
phi-loop-auto.title: Phi Loop Auto

phi-microdose-loop.description: Local Phi microdose advisory loop with bounded autonomy.
phi-microdose-loop.function: Small local AI reasoning dose over file-backed Nexus evidence.
phi-microdose-loop.operator_use: Use when an active wound needs local AI steering but no autonomous mutation.
phi-microdose-loop.title: Phi Microdose Loop

phi-wound-advisor.description: Micro-dose local Phi-4 Mini on compact wound packets and return advisory repair JSON.
phi-wound-advisor.function: Ask local Phi-4 Mini to diagnose the active wound without giving it repo, shell, git, network, or secret authority.
phi-wound-advisor.operator_use: Use immediately after wound-compress or preflight failure to get an advisory repair plan.
phi-wound-advisor.title: Phi Wound Advisor

phi-wound-gpu-gate.description: Require configured local GPU Phi-4 Mini to return a wound-advice packet.
phi-wound-gpu-gate.function: Separate model gate for local Phi-4 Mini base model advisory analysis.
phi-wound-gpu-gate.operator_use: Use when the operator wants the actual local Phi-4 Mini model called, not only deterministic fallback.
phi-wound-gpu-gate.title: Phi Wound GPU Gate

preflight-optimizer.description: Preflight the next mutation surface before a generated closer runs.
preflight-optimizer.function: Check command parity, packet contracts, README freshness, bounded report shape, and ignored staging risk before mutation.
preflight-optimizer.operator_use: Use before writing or running a closer script, especially after wound compression.
preflight-optimizer.title: Preflight Optimizer

refactor-map.description: Map refactor candidates without changing files.
refactor-map.function: Map refactor candidates without changing files.
refactor-map.operator_use: Use when code shape is getting dense.
refactor-map.title: Refactor Map

reflective-validation.description: Run compiler/test gates and convert failure into compact local intelligence.
reflective-validation.function: Run compiler/test gates and convert failure into compact local intelligence.
reflective-validation.operator_use: Use when this named loop matches the active gate or wound.
reflective-validation.title: Reflective Validation

release-brief.description: Compile a human-readable release brief from current cards, compiler status, git state, and docs.
release-brief.function: Gives the human a compact release summary before commit/push.
release-brief.operator_use: Use immediately before release-seal or after a compiler pass.
release-brief.title: Release Brief

release-seal.description: Final local evidence before human-authorized commit/push.
release-seal.function: Final local evidence before human-authorized commit/push.
release-seal.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
release-seal.title: Release Seal

repo-radar.description: Build a compact local repo health radar for AI orchestration.
repo-radar.function: Summarize HEAD, dirty state, loop/card counts, compiler status, and next visibility surfaces.
repo-radar.operator_use: Use first when the AI needs situational awareness before selecting the next local loop.
repo-radar.title: Repo Radar

rhp-core.description: Deep repository-origin rehydration before patching or compounding.
rhp-core.function: Deep repository-origin rehydration before patching or compounding.
rhp-core.operator_use: Use when this named loop matches the active gate or wound.
rhp-core.title: Rhp Core

risk-register.description: List repo-local risks, dirty surfaces, boundary risks, and stale surfaces.
risk-register.function: List repo-local risks, dirty surfaces, boundary risks, and stale surfaces.
risk-register.title: Risk Register

safe-ship-chain.description: Run scope hygiene, claim/boundary audits, release brief, and commit story before human-authorized seal.
safe-ship-chain.function: Prepares a clean release narrative without granting commit or push authority.
safe-ship-chain.operator_use: Use before release-seal and human-authorized commit/push.
safe-ship-chain.title: Safe Ship Chain

scope-hygiene.description: Classify local changes into intended source/docs/tests versus residue/backups/runtime churn.
scope-hygiene.function: Prevents accidental staging by producing a scope-hygiene packet before commit or cleanup.
scope-hygiene.operator_use: Use before staging, committing, or deciding what a closer is allowed to touch.
scope-hygiene.title: Scope Hygiene

script-evolution.description: Plan and bound a generated script so the script triggers local intelligence instead of duplicating it.
script-evolution.function: Plan and bound a generated script so the script triggers local intelligence instead of duplicating it.
script-evolution.operator_use: Use when this named loop matches the active gate or wound.
script-evolution.title: Script Evolution

session-brief.description: Create a compact session brief for ChatGPT/Codex continuation.
session-brief.function: Create a compact session brief for ChatGPT/Codex continuation.
session-brief.operator_use: Use at the end or start of a work block.
session-brief.title: Session Brief

stale-surface-scan.description: Find likely stale version/current-line references without treating lineage references as failures.
stale-surface-scan.function: Highlights places where docs or tests may still point at old current-state claims.
stale-surface-scan.operator_use: Use after version bumps, README edits, or portal/HUD lineage updates.
stale-surface-scan.title: Stale Surface Scan

surface-map.description: Map source, docs, tests, state, reports, and loop surfaces into a compact topology packet.
surface-map.function: Gives the AI a repo topology map so future patches can target the correct organ.
surface-map.operator_use: Use when adding modules, docs, tests, or HUD surfaces.
surface-map.title: Surface Map

test-strategy.description: Select targeted tests, bounded suite policy, and compiler gates for a change.
test-strategy.function: Select targeted tests, bounded suite policy, and compiler gates for a change.
test-strategy.title: Test Strategy

toolbelt-cockpit.description: Render the v0.9.7 AI Toolbelt Cockpit: status, recommendation, next command, and process chains.
toolbelt-cockpit.function: Turns the Toolbelt packet into a human cockpit without granting authority.
toolbelt-cockpit.operator_use: Use at session start or after a wound to see the next governed local action.
toolbelt-cockpit.title: Toolbelt Cockpit

toolbelt-console.description: Emit the Toolbelt Console dashboard packet.
toolbelt-console.function: Emit the Toolbelt Console dashboard packet.
toolbelt-console.title: Toolbelt Console

toolbelt-dashboard.description: Emit the compact local dashboard for repo status, loop groups, recommended chain, and safety boundary.
toolbelt-dashboard.function: A single JSON dashboard for the AI and human to align on what tools exist and what should run next.
toolbelt-dashboard.operator_use: Use when you want the AI to stop guessing and select from the current toolbelt.
toolbelt-dashboard.title: Toolbelt Dashboard

toolbelt-index.description: Build the operator-visible AI toolbelt index from loop cards and registry evidence.
toolbelt-index.function: Creates the local command/toolbelt map for orientation, planning, debugging, documentation, shipping, and continuity.
toolbelt-index.operator_use: Use first when the AI needs to see the full local toolkit and choose a grounded next loop.
toolbelt-index.title: Toolbelt Index

toolbelt-json.description: Emit the v0.9.7 AI Toolbelt machine packet for ChatGPT/Codex handoff.
toolbelt-json.function: Provides file-backed JSON evidence for the Toolbelt cockpit and recommended next loop.
toolbelt-json.operator_use: Use when an AI needs the packet rather than the human cockpit text.
toolbelt-json.title: Toolbelt JSON Packet

toolbelt-next.description: Route to the next recommended local loop using the Toolbelt view.
toolbelt-next.operator_use: Route to the next recommended local loop.
toolbelt-next.title: Toolbelt Next

toolbelt-process.description: Explain the default Start/Build/Debug/Ship/Continuity process chains.
toolbelt-process.title: Toolbelt Process

toolbelt-ship.description: Prepare a safe ship lane from scope hygiene through release brief and release seal.
toolbelt-ship.function: Chains hygiene, boundary, release brief, and release seal evidence before a human-authorized commit/push script.
toolbelt-ship.operator_use: Use after a patch when the repo appears ready to validate and ship.
toolbelt-ship.title: Toolbelt Ship

toolbelt-ship-console.description: Show the shipping console path and recommended ship lane.
toolbelt-ship-console.title: Toolbelt Ship Console

toolbelt-start.description: Start a coding session through rehydration, repo radar, toolbelt index, and next-action routing.
toolbelt-start.function: Boots the personal coding paradise flow without giving the AI direct authority.
toolbelt-start.operator_use: Use at the beginning of a new session or after a context break.
toolbelt-start.title: Toolbelt Start

ui-polish.description: Inspect HUD/operator surfaces and suggest visual/usability polishing moves.
ui-polish.function: Inspect HUD/operator surfaces and suggest visual/usability polishing moves.
ui-polish.title: Ui Polish

validate-promote.description: Verify candidate patch and stop before commit/push unless the human-authorized outer script performs it.
validate-promote.function: Verify candidate patch and stop before commit/push unless the human-authorized outer script performs it.
validate-promote.operator_use: Use when this named loop matches the active gate or wound.
validate-promote.title: Validate Promote

wound-compression-engine.description: Read bounded/compiler/toolbelt/git evidence and compress the active wound into one repair target.
wound-compression-engine.function: Compress active wound evidence without granting mutation authority.
wound-compression-engine.operator_use: Use after any failed gate before writing a new closer.

wound-indexed-resume.description: Emit active wound and resume recommendation.
wound-indexed-resume.function: Emit active wound and resume recommendation.
wound-indexed-resume.operator_use: Use when this loop matches the active gate, wound, or validation need.
wound-indexed-resume.title: Wound Indexed Resume
